items.title: AssetMark Welcomes Seasoned Executives Doris Meister and Lisa Opoku to Board of Directors
items.author: Na
items.description: AssetMark, a leading wealth management technology platform, has appointed Doris Meister and Lisa Opoku to its Board of Directors. The new directors bring extensive experience in financial services, strategic transformation, and operational excellence, which will help shape AssetMark's future growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Lisa Opoku's previous senior leadership positions at Goldman Sachs, including as the Global Head of the Goldman Sachs Partner Family Office, are seen as relevant experience that will benefit AssetMark.

items.title: Economists, Betting Markets Predict Benign January Inflation: What Could Go Wrong This Time?
items.author: Piero Cingari
items.description: Economists and betting markets expect a mild January inflation report, fueling hopes for rate cuts. However, risks of surprises remain, with concerns about persistent underlying price pressures.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions Bank of America economist Aditya Bhave's expectations for the January inflation report, including projections for core goods prices and shelter inflation.
